common.timeoutTip:
AI response timeout (minutes)
Set in 10-min increments, or type a custom value

errors.connectionRefused: Connection failed. Please check that the service is running.
errors.timeout: Timeout: No response within the time limit. Check your connection or server load.
errors.dnsError: DNS resolution failed. Please check your network connection.
errors.sslError: SSL/TLS certificate error. Please check your network environment.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.unauthorized: Authentication failed. Please check your API key or credentials.
errors.forbidden: Access denied. Please check your API key permissions.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.serverError: Server error occurred. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.invalidJson: Invalid response format. Please try again.
errors.outOfMemory: Out of memory. Try a lighter model or close other applications.
errors.promptEmpty: Prompt is empty. Please enter a message.
errors.noModelSpecified: No model specified. Please select a model.

claude.actionRequired: Claude CLI is waiting for user input. Run 'claude' in a terminal to review the terms of service.
claude.notFound: Claude CLI not found. Please install Claude Code.
claude.timeout: Claude CLI timed out ({seconds}s). Please increase the timeout setting.
claude.exitCode: Claude CLI execution failed (check logs for details)
claude.apiError: Claude API returned an error (check logs for details)
claude.quotaExceeded: Claude API usage limit reached. Please check your plan.

ollama.modelNotFound: Ollama model '{model}' not found. Run 'ollama pull {model}'.
ollama.connectionFailed: Cannot connect to Ollama. Please check that Ollama is running.
ollama.timeout: Ollama timed out. Try a lighter model or increase the timeout setting.
ollama.pullFailed: Failed to download model. Please check your network connection.

gemini.notFound: Gemini CLI not found. Please install Google AI CLI.
gemini.safetyBlock: Blocked by safety filter. Please modify your prompt.
gemini.quotaExceeded: Gemini API usage limit reached. Please wait and try again.
gemini.apiKeyMissing: Google API key not set. Please enter it in the Settings tab.
gemini.timeout: Gemini API timed out. Please increase the timeout setting.

openai.apiKeyMissing: OpenAI API key not set. Please enter it in the Settings tab.
openai.quotaExceeded: OpenAI API usage limit reached. Please check your billing status.
openai.contextTooLong: Input is too long. Please shorten your message or clear the context.
openai.contentFiltered: Blocked by content policy. Please modify your prompt.

preLogin.loginRequired: Login required to view chat contents

chat.startMessage: Send a message to start a conversation

fileManager.emptyDir: Empty directory or project not configured

settings.defaultModelTip: Select the default Claude model for all tabs
settings.timeoutTip:
AI response timeout (minutes)
Set in 10-min increments, or type a custom value
settings.cliTestTip: Check Claude Code CLI installation and auth status
settings.cliInstallInstructions:
Claude CLI: npm i -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
Ollama: https://ollama.com/download
Codex CLI: npm i -g @openai/codex
settings.mcpEnableAllTip: Enable all MCP servers at once
settings.mcpDisableAllTip: Disable all MCP servers at once
settings.memoryStatsTip:
Current item count of the 4-layer memory system
Episodic=conversation logs  Semantic=facts  Procedural=procedures
settings.ragEnabledTip:
Enable RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
Generate responses using past memories
settings.memoryAutoSaveTip:
After each response, Memory Risk Gate evaluates quality
and automatically saves useful info to the 4-layer memory
settings.riskGate: Memory Risk Gate: Enabled (ministral-3:8b quality check)
settings.riskGateTip:
Quality evaluation by ministral-3:8b
Checks for duplicates/contradictions/volatility
settings.refreshStatsTip: Fetch the latest item counts and statistics
settings.cleanupMemoryTip:
Clean up infrequently used memories
(converts to summaries, not deletion)
settings.cleanupDoneMsg:
Cleaned up memories unused for 90+ days.
Deleted: {count} items
settings.fontSizeTip: Change font size for all tabs
settings.terminalVisibleTip: Show the console window for log viewing and debugging
settings.enterToSendTip: ON: Enter to send / Shift+Enter for newline. OFF: Shift+Enter to send / Enter for newline
settings.autoSaveHint: Automatically saves chat interactions to files
settings.discordSendBtnTip: Send server URL and QR code to Discord
settings.saveButtonTip: Save all settings to config.json + app_settings.json
settings.residentControlAiTip: Resident model for task classification, routing, and memory quality assessment
settings.residentEmbeddingTip: Resident embedding model for RAG/Knowledge/memory search
settings.residentGpuTargetTip: Select GPU for resident model execution
settings.optionalToolsDesc: These packages extend functionality. Core features work without them.
settings.optToolBrowserUseDesc: JS-rendered page URL fetching (localAI). Without it, only static pages can be fetched.
settings.optToolSentenceTransDesc: Local embedding generation (RAG). Without it, Ollama Embedding is used.
settings.optToolInstallSuccess:
{pip} installed successfully.
Restart the app to activate.
settings.optToolChromiumInstallNote: Chromium was also installed (required for browser-use).
settings.optToolInstallTimeout: Installation timed out. Please run manually.
settings.googleApiKeyLabel: Google API Key (Gemini) - Get key: https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey (free, no credit card)
settings.googleApiKeyPlaceholder: AIza... (Leave empty to disable Gemini API)
settings.apiKeySecurityNote: API keys are secret. Do not commit to Git or use in shared environments. Setting via environment variables is recommended.

common.bibleToggleTooltip: Toggle BIBLE context injection (Build Information Base for Lifecycle Engineering)
common.pilotToggleTooltip: Enable Helix Pilot (GUI automation). When ON, the LLM can see the screen and execute GUI commands
common.pilotCheckboxTooltip:
Helix Pilot (GUI Automation)
When ON, the AI can see the screen state
and execute click, type, scroll, and other
GUI commands autonomously.

Requires Ollama + Vision model
configured in Settings tab.

chatHistory.title: Chat History
chatHistory.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this chat?

mainWindow.settingsSaved: ⚙️ Settings saved. (Some settings take effect after restart)
mainWindow.mixAITip:
mixAI - Integrated Execution Architecture

High-precision orchestration with Claude Code + local LLM team


・Phase 1: Claude planning (response + LLM instructions)
・Phase 2: Local LLM sequential execution
・Phase 3: Claude comparison & integration

Ctrl+Enter to send message
mainWindow.cloudAITip:
cloudAI - Cloud AI Chat & Settings

Direct conversation with Claude CLI, integrated MCP management.

Sub-tabs:
・Chat: AI conversation
・Settings: CLI/Ollama settings, MCP management

Ctrl+Enter to send message
mainWindow.localAITip:
localAI - Local LLM Chat

Direct conversation with local models via Ollama.

Sub-tabs:
・Chat: Local LLM conversation
・Settings: Ollama management, custom server settings

Ctrl+Enter to send message
mainWindow.infoTip:
Information Collection - Autonomous RAG Pipeline

Store documents and automatically build RAG
with Claude + local LLMs.

3 Steps:
・Step 1: Claude plan creation
・Step 2: Local LLM autonomous execution
・Step 3: Claude quality verification
mainWindow.ragTip:
RAG - AI Knowledge Base

RAG context building, Knowledge Graph management.
Manage RAG through AI chat.
mainWindow.historyTip:
History - Unified Chat History

Search, view, and quote chat history from all tabs via JSONL.

Features:
・Tab filter (cloudAI / mixAI / localAI / All)
・Full-text search & date grouping
・Copy messages & quote to other tabs
mainWindow.virtualDesktopTip:
Virtual Desktop

Safely execute code in Windows Sandbox / Docker.

Features:
・Virtual desktop environment
・Sandbox file editing
・Diff preview & promote to host
・Rollback support
mainWindow.settingsTip:
General Settings - App-wide Configuration

Display settings, automation options, etc.

Key Features:
・Theme & font settings
・Auto-save settings
・Knowledge/Encyclopedia

history.selectMessage: Select a message to view details

Claude CLI is not available.

3. Restart the application

Or switch auth mode to "API (pay-per-use)".

mixAI.title: 🚀 mixAI - Integrated Orchestration
mixAI.continueSub: Send a message to continue a stopped process
mixAI.inputPlaceholder: Type a message here... (Ctrl+Enter to send)
mixAI.executeTip:
Start execution pipeline
(Phase 1: Claude Plan → Phase 2: Local LLM → Phase 3: Claude Synthesis)
mixAI.engineTip:
P1/P3 Engine: Model used for planning & synthesis
Claude = via API, Local = via Ollama
mixAI.engineDescClaude: ☁ Uses Anthropic API (direct connection when API key is set)
mixAI.engineDescGemini: ☁ Uses Google Gemini API (direct connection when API key is set)
mixAI.engineDescOpenAI: ☁ Uses OpenAI API (direct connection when API key is set)
mixAI.engineDescLocal: 🖥 Uses local LLM agent (requires Ollama). Recommended: 32B+
mixAI.attachTip:
Attach files for Claude CLI
Code, documents, images, etc.
mixAI.historyTip: Search past mixAI conversation history and insert as citation.
mixAI.snippetAddTip: Click to add, right-click for edit/delete menu
mixAI.neuralFlowTip: Real-time display of execution pipeline progress
mixAI.ragBuildingMsg:
RAG building is in progress on the Information tab.

mixAI.noOutput: Task processed but no output was generated.
mixAI.phase35Desc: Reviews Phase 3 output and re-runs Phase 3 if major revisions are needed
mixAI.manageModelsDesc:
Manage which models appear in each Phase's selection.
Uncheck to hide a model from the dropdown.
mixAI.phaseDesc: Phase 1 (Planning) → Phase 2 (Local LLM Sequential) → Phase 3 (Comparison & Synthesis)
mixAI.engineNote: P1/P3 Engine: Select next to the Execute button on Chat tab
mixAI.maxRetriesTip: Max retries of Phase 2 when Phase 3 detects insufficient quality (0 to disable)
mixAI.bibleTip: Display auto-detection, analysis, and injection status of project BIBLE
mixAI.vramTip: Tool for simulating VRAM usage of each GPU
mixAI.vramDesc:
Select models and assign to GPUs to simulate VRAM usage.
Drag & drop to move models between GPUs.
mixAI.gpuGroupTip:
Real-time monitoring of GPU utilization and VRAM consumption
Recording starts automatically during LLM execution
mixAI.gpuRefreshTip: Get list of models installed on Ollama
mixAI.gpuAutoDesc: 💡 GPU usage is automatically recorded 5 seconds after LLM execution / Use slider to view past data
mixAI.gpuNoData:
No GPU usage data
Recording starts when execution begins
mixAI.saveTip: Save all mixAI tab settings to config/config.json
mixAI.researchCloudWarningText:
A cloud AI model is selected for the Research category.
Research involves many repeated API calls, which may result in significant costs.
mixAI.researchCloudWarningInfo: Using a local LLM is recommended. Save anyway?

Failed to connect to Ollama.
Please check the Ollama URL in Settings tab.
mixAI.bibleNoUpdate: No updates needed at this time.
mixAI.vramWarningMsg: GPU {gpu} has exceeded VRAM by {overflow} GB.
mixAI.historyNotReadyMsg: History citation feature is under development.
mixAI.errorStatusBrief: mixAI execution error (check logs for details)

roleHint.coding: Select an AI suited for code generation, modification, test creation, and multi-file consistency. Sufficient context length and structured output are required.
roleHint.research: Select an AI suited for organizing information, comparison, evidence extraction, and integrating search results. Ability to accurately summarize large texts is important.
roleHint.reasoning: Select an AI suited for clarifying ambiguous requirements, comparing hypotheses, and step-by-step judgment. Models that can articulate their thinking process are advantageous.
roleHint.translation: Select an AI suited for multi-language conversion, meaning preservation, and tone adjustment. Maintaining the nuance of the original text is important.
roleHint.vision: Only AI models capable of interpreting image input can be selected. Models without image support cannot be used for this role.

mixAI.mcpNotConfigured:
✅ Claude CLI: {cmd}
  MCP Servers: Not configured
mixAI.ollamaConnFailedFull:
Failed to connect to Ollama.
Please check the Ollama URL in the Settings tab.
mixAI.claudeModelOpus46Desc: The most advanced and intelligent model. Best for complex reasoning and planning.
mixAI.claudeModelOpus45Desc: High quality and balanced responses. Stability-focused.
mixAI.claudeModelSonnet45Desc: Fast responses and cost efficiency. For everyday tasks.
mixAI.claudeModelSonnet46Desc: Fast and powerful. Next to Opus 4.6 in reasoning with great cost efficiency
mixAI.phase4ModelTip:
Model for Phase 4 (implementation)
Disable to use Phase 3 answer as final
mixAI.model1mWarning: ⚠ 1M context models may only be available with API/pay-per-use plans. Check your subscription plan.
mixAI.model1mFallback: 1M model unavailable, fell back to standard model
mixAI.gptEffortTip:
GPT reasoning effort level (token budget)
default=CLI default / minimal / low / medium / high / xhigh
mixAI.refreshPhaseModelsTip: Refresh model lists from cloudAI/localAI into all Phase combos
mixAI.browserUseTip: Automatically fetch URLs found in the prompt and inject content into context (static pages, httpx-based, no extra install required)
mixAI.effortFallbackWarn: Error in effort setting. Retrying in normal mode

mixAI.bibleDesc: Automatically injects BIBLE file (project specification) content into AI prompts. When enabled, it applies across all tabs (cloudAI / localAI / mixAI).
mixAI.bibleEnabledTooltip: When ON, project specifications from the BIBLE folder are automatically attached to all AI prompts. This allows the AI to understand your project's design principles and rules before responding.
mixAI.pilotDesc: Automates desktop GUI using Vision LLM. Requires Ollama with a Vision-capable model.
mixAI.pilotEnabledTooltip: When ON, GUI automation commands (<<PILOT:...>>) become available in all tab AI responses. The AI can recognize screen state and autonomously execute click, type, scroll, and other GUI operations. Requires Ollama + Vision model.

infoTab.orphanScanTip: Detect orphaned data from deleted files
infoTab.docDeleteLabel: Select and delete unnecessary built documents:
infoTab.deleteSelectedDocsTip: Delete RAG data for selected documents (files themselves are kept)
infoTab.noFileSelectedMsg:
No files selected for RAG build.
Please check files in the file tree.
infoTab.noOrphansSelectedMsg: Please select orphan data to delete.
infoTab.deleteOrphanConfirm: Delete {count} orphan data entries. This cannot be undone.
infoTab.docDeleteConfirmMsg:
Delete data for {count} selected document(s).
The files themselves will not be deleted (remain in data/information/).
This cannot be undone.
infoTab.autoKgUpdateTip: Automatically extract entity relations after AI responses and add to KG
infoTab.hypeEnabledTip: Generate hypothetical questions for saved facts to improve search accuracy
infoTab.rerankerEnabledTip: Rerank RAG search results with LLM to return the most relevant results
infoTab.autoEnhanceInfo: All features run automatically in the background
infoTab.chunkSizeHint: Unit for splitting documents (in tokens). Recommended: 256-1024
infoTab.overlapHint: Overlap tokens between adjacent chunks. Recommended: 10-20% of chunk size
infoTab.ragChatPlaceholder: Check RAG status or send a question
infoTab.ragAddFilesTooltip: Add files to the RAG folder
infoTab.ragDeleteDialogHint: Select documents to delete (chunk count shown)

chatInput.placeholder: Type a message... (Enter: Send, Shift+Enter: Newline)

neuralViz.phase4Desc: Apply file changes from Phase 3 results

bibleNotification.tooltip:
BIBLE file (project design doc) detected.
Click 'Add to context' to inject BIBLE info into Phase 1/3.
Click × to dismiss.

chatWidgets.continueBtnTip: Resume processing from where it stopped
chatWidgets.cancelBtnTip: Cancel processing and return to chat

biblePanel.infoLabel: Auto-detect via file attachment or path specification
biblePanel.pathPlaceholder: Enter BIBLE file or project directory path...
biblePanel.pathTooltip:
Enter BIBLE file path or project directory and press Enter
3-level search (current → child → parent) for auto-detection
biblePanel.searchTooltip: Search for BIBLE from the specified path
biblePanel.createTooltip: Create a new BIBLE file from template
biblePanel.disabledTooltip: Becomes available after detecting or creating a BIBLE
biblePanel.updateTooltip: Update BIBLE content based on latest code changes

ragLock.lockMsg:
RAG building is in progress on the Information tab.
This feature is unavailable until it completes.

vramSim.catalogDesc: Click to add to GPU 0, drag to assign to any GPU

backends.agentNoResponse: Error: No response from Ollama API
backends.agentLoopLimit: Warning: Agent loop reached maximum (15 tool calls)

routingLog.title: Routing Decision Log

View backend selection history.
Track why each backend was selected, fallback status, etc.
routingLog.sessionFilterTooltip: Show only logs for a specific session
routingLog.detailTooltip: Show details of the selected log
routingLog.statsFormat: Success rate: {rate}% | Success: {success} | Error: {error} | Blocked: {blocked} | Fallback: {fallback}

diffViewer.statsFormat: Files changed: {files} | Added: +{added} lines | Deleted: -{deleted} lines
diffViewer.highRiskConfirmMsg:
This operation has been assessed as high risk.

Risk Score: {score}/100

Main factors:
{reasons}

Proceed with applying?

workflowBar.defaultDesc: Receive the request from the user and organize requirements.
workflowBar.prevTooltip: Go back one phase (one step only)
workflowBar.nextTooltip: Proceed to next phase (only if conditions are met)
workflowBar.riskApprovalTooltip:
Approve dangerous operations (write, delete, etc.) in this phase.
Cannot proceed without approval.

historyCitation.previewPlaceholder: Select a history item to preview it here
historyCitation.dialogDesc:
Search past chat history and insert selected content as a citation.
Search, select an item, and press "Insert Citation".

virtualDesktop.placeholder:
Start a Sandbox to display the virtual desktop here.

Click the "▶ Start" button in the toolbar to begin.
virtualDesktop.placeholderDockerMissing:
⚠️ No available backend detected.
Check the backend settings in the Settings tab.
virtualDesktop.dockerMissingDialog:
No available backend detected.

[Windows Sandbox (Standard)]
1. Settings → Apps → Optional features → Enable "Windows Sandbox"
2. Restart your PC
※ Requires Windows 11 Pro / Enterprise / Education

[Docker Compatible Runtime (Advanced)]
1. Install Docker Desktop (https://www.docker.com/products/docker-desktop)
2. Start Docker Desktop
3. Click '🔄 Refresh' to re-check the status

[If the Docker image is not built]
Go to Settings tab → click '🔨 Build Image'.
virtualDesktop.imageMissingBuild:
⚠️ Sandbox image is not built.
Go to Settings tab → click '🔨 Build Image'.
virtualDesktop.modelNoTools:
⚠️ This model does not support tool execution (file writing).
To write files to the Sandbox, use a tool-capable model (e.g., llama3, codellama).
virtualDesktop.resetConfirm:
Reset Sandbox?
The container will be destroyed and recreated.
virtualDesktop.promoteConfirm:
Apply {count} file(s) to the host?
(An automatic backup will be created)
virtualDesktop.writeDisabledNoSandbox: File writing is only available in Sandbox mode. Start a Sandbox from the Virtual Desktop tab.
virtualDesktop.guacamoleAuthFailed: Authentication failed. Check your username and password.
virtualDesktop.guacamoleHint:
To start Guacamole with Docker:
docker run -d -p 8080:8080 guacamole/guacamole
(guacd + DB setup required)
virtualDesktop.placeholderWinSandboxMissing:
⚠️ Windows Sandbox is not enabled.

[How to enable]
1. Settings → Apps → Optional features → More Windows features
2. Check "Windows Sandbox"
3. Restart your PC

※ Requires Windows 11 Pro / Enterprise / Education.
virtualDesktop.placeholderWinSandboxRunning:
🖥️ The virtual desktop is running in an external window.

Windows Sandbox runs in a separate window.
Click the Windows Sandbox icon in the taskbar to interact.
virtualDesktop.enableInstructions: Enable: Settings → Apps → Optional features → Windows Sandbox

localAI.attachTip: Attach files and add to input
localAI.snippetTip: Select a saved snippet to insert
localAI.title: 🖥️ localAI - Local LLM Chat
localAI.inputPlaceholder: Type a message here... (Ctrl+Enter to send)
localAI.modelTip: Select an Ollama model to use
localAI.noModels: No models found (Ollama may not be running)
localAI.continueSub: Send a message to continue a stopped process
localAI.addModelDesc: Register a model to use. Select a connection method, then enter the model call name using the examples below.
localAI.addModelNameTooltip: Display name shown in the app (optional). Defaults to model ID if blank
localAI.providerTooltip:
Select connection method
· API: Requires API key (pay-per-use)
· CLI: Requires official CLI tool
localAI.modelIdTooltip:
The official model call name for the provider
See examples below
localAI.noModelsConfigured: No models registered. Go to Settings → Cloud Model Management → Add to register a model.
localAI.browserUseTip:
When enabled, the local LLM can fetch web pages with JS rendering via browser-use
(httpx fallback used automatically when browser_use is not installed)
localAI.browserUseHttpxMode:
When enabled, fetches URLs in prompts and injects content (current: static pages only, httpx-based)
Install browser-use for JavaScript-rendered pages:
pip install browser-use && python -m playwright install chromium
localAI.googleApiKeyLabel: Google API Key (Gemini) - Get: https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey (free, no credit card)

pilot.notAvailable: Helix Pilot unavailable. Check Ollama connection and Vision model in Settings.
pilot.ollamaRequired:
Ollama is not installed or not running.

1. Install Ollama from https://ollama.com
2. ollama pull mistral-small3.2:latest
3. Set Vision model in Settings tab
pilot.visionModelRequired:
Vision model not configured.

Go to Settings > Helix Pilot > Vision Model
and enter a Vision-capable model name.

Recommended models:
- mistral-small3.2:latest
- llama3.2-vision:11b
